method: Each compact finding was re-read at its current code site. Live gaps were expanded into one open bead with repo/path/site, risk, narrow fix, negative acceptance, positive acceptance, labels, and parent dependency. Already-landed or rejected near-misses are explicitly non-beadable with current-code evidence; no product implementation was performed.

normalized_beads.verified: FixedOffset seconds are divided by 60 without a divisibility check.
Integer coercion parses the leading -1 from -1e126.
AUTH serial is parsed as u64 and cast with as u16; the test pins wrapping.
Last-handle election uses observational Arc::strong_count.
Every TimedAcquireDeadline spawns and detaches one std thread.
preview_dml max_rows has no schema maximum and is copied into QueryCaps unclamped.
Capacity pruning removes HashMap keys().next(), not the oldest live grant.
Central budgets filter zero while only selected tools call the rejecting helper.
Checkpoint and undo successes mutate transaction state but are absent from terminal-effect recognition.
Single statements normalize VECTOR_EMBEDDING but the outer multi-statement parser sees original syntax.
Unmatched supplied named binds are appended positionally; the current test pins the tail.
Recovery returns Quarantined but does not persist quarantine_reason in the emptied slot.
Signed interval components are interpolated independently in four serializers.
The in-progress lease stores only a key and has no Drop cleanup.
One global Condvar and notify_all wake every session waiter on one-session append.
CEF tests cover CR/LF and delimiters but not Unicode line separators.
Offline binding uses an ASCII substring search over entry_body.
The value backstop has no OCID-in-prose recognizer.
Destination symlink checks and path-based rename are separate operations.
An empty collected base-object set is treated as ProvenReadOnly without independently proving absence of FROM.

non_beadable_resolved.evidence: rust-oracledb commit abc4dd3 is an ancestor; lib.rs:2874-3010 now passes the configured transport timeout to TCP and TLS, with focused stalled-peer/full-descriptor tests.
rust-oracledb commit b364f0c changes convert.rs:1225-1233 to div_euclid(1000) and tests negative sub-microsecond values.
rust-oracledb commit 6e01bc9 adds len() >= 2 in protocol/sql.rs:402-412, a lone-quote regression at 934-946, and the sql_statement_surface fuzz target. No remaining fix exists to bead.
connection.rs:2819-2824 and 3057-3062 now map QueryValue::Boolean to exact Boolean cells; the existing individual bead is closed.

record.rs:1739-1807 uses stable numeric decision/outcome tags and length-frames every variable string in the v5+ canonical preimage; current schema is v10. The reported unprefixed Debug preimage is legacy-only, so no current-schema fix remains.
oraclemcp-auth secrets.rs:64-69 renders Malformed and NotFound without their stored raw reference, and main.rs:913-930 preserves the redacted summary. No raw ref is echoed through Display.

explicit_wontfix.evidence: protocol/vector.rs:239-247 documents the public infallible convenience panic, while untrusted bind and OSON re-encoders call encode_vector_checked at thin/bind.rs:1264 and oson.rs:1066. Invalid decoded input remains fallible; changing the convenience API is not a bug fix.

protocol/oson.rs bounds field-name and container counts through ProtocolLimits and with_capacity_limited before allocation, with object-element-count and oversized-count regressions. The reported count-times-size shape is already fail-closed.

pool.rs:1526-1529 sends the drop return and calls bounded notify_one; the region-owned reaper also drains the queue and has a periodic wake. Correctness does not depend on a separate off-lock broadcast, so adding one would be redundant.
